steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The strongest signal is the phrase "Bloom praises the novel's adroit blend", which directly states the critic's reason for appreciating the work.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice D directly addresses a literary critic (Bloom) being impressed by a novel for defying Schiller's categorization. A misinterprets the text by implying a rigid classification is being argued, B misplaces emphasis on the poet Merrill, and C introduces an irrelevant "inspiration" claim. That matches choice D — D is correct.
